deals.title: 3504 Painted Riv
deals.notes: Off-market flip opportunity. Purchase $199K, rehab $65K, ARV $340K, projected profit $42K-$62K. 31 comps pulled, avg $207K. Built 2009, 4/3, 2039 sqft. Property analysis template being developed.
deals.next: Feed data to Sirhc, build first analysis sheet, lock template

logs.m: Investor sent deal via link. Used as basis for property analysis tool.

deals.title: 00 Borregas
deals.notes: Land with development potential. Isaac interested in mobile home development (10-acre lots, half units for veterans). Sellers excited about Isaac interest. Title defect confirmed - incomplete legal description. Correction Deed being prepared by Van Hutchins. Isaac exploring owner finance options.
deals.next: Confirm sisters decision on listing extension. Present Isaac formal offer once details confirmed. Connect Isaac with Josh LT partner.

logs.m: Price adjustment needed. Follow up prior buyers. Isaac expanding concept to 10-acre lots. Josh LT potential partner.
Jennifer Ball contacted ENV Title, hired attorney Van Hutchins. Title defect confirmed - Deed #20100079485 has incomplete legal description.
Isaac Linares development interest. Mobile home concept, ~$150K offer, half units for veterans, half for profit.

deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Underwater by $93K-$143K. Payoff ~$493K, market value $350K-$400K. 208 DOM, vacant 6 months, double-carrying. VA loan 5.25%. Chandler laid off. Three paths discussed: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction with cash to close. Matt and Chandler leaning short sale.
deals.next: Draft short sale client email. Get Lauren trained on Newrez packet. Prepare Path A documentation.

logs.m: Call completed. Chandler laid off - strong hardship for short sale. Short-term rental ruled out. Moving ruled out. Matt and Chandler leaning short sale.
Where Things Stand email sent. Market analysis presented. Three paths laid out. Option 3: drop to $518,999.
Outside agent showing today 2pm. Lawn care referral from Garry Stephens.

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: 3/2, 1809 sqft, 4.05 acres. Payoff $257K. Market range $275K-$315K. Thin market - 3 comps in 10 miles. CMA completed. Recommended list $295K. Colton looking for contractor work at 181 CR 7751.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter. Confirm acreage. Schedule professional photos. Discuss Colton contractor opportunity.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 (Feb 2026). CMA pulled - thin market. Built net sheet.
Prior VA loan clients. Divorce - need to sell. Colton looking for contractor work.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: 3BR/2.5BA. MLS live May 14. Relocating to NC, second week June deadline. Payoff discrepancy flagged ($170K stated vs $192K public records). Foundation hairline crack disclosed. First showing feedback - cultural concern about facing direction. Insurance adjuster out May 11, roof claim approved. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
deals.next: Monitor showings and offers. Roof/fascia decision pending. Update sellers on investor cash offer feedback.

logs.m: Texted Jose and Katy about investor offer at $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23 at 1:30 PM.
MLS live. Sign and lockbox dropped. Neighborhood canvassed. First showing feedback - cultural concern, roof situation explained.
Listing agreement signed. Photos in from ATG - 43 photos plus floorplans.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Cash transaction $152,000. Closed and funded April 27, 2026. Lien blocker resolved Apr 21 with Fernando Castillo signature. Military buyer through Sam VanDenheuvel, Exquisite SA.
deals.next: Deliver joy gift basket. Thank Sam VanDenheuvel. Thank Chelsey Bongiovi.

logs.m: Officially closed and funded.
Fernando Castillo signed lien release. Delivered to Chicago Title Alyssa Castillo.
Spoke with Fabian Cerrillo - family member of lien holder. Cooperative.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned REO. Cleanup and renovation in progress (Matt Toney/SA Remodelers). Floor demo complete, drywall cut for trades. Utility setup pending - Medina Electric and EMCSUD confirmed. Listing agreement still needed to bank.
deals.next: Get transformer number on-site. Submit Medina Electric application. Confirm water setup with EMCSUD. Send listing agreement to Jerry and Ray.

logs.m: Cleanup active - floor demo complete, drywall cut. Utility providers confirmed. Listing paperwork needed to Priority Bank.
Listing agreement needs to go to Jerry Sadler and Ray Stidham.
Met with Matt Toney in office. Connected with Jerry Sadler on phone. Work target Monday.

deals.title: Tilden 20ac
deals.notes: 20 acres hunting property. A-735 S-46. Price adjusted to $117,500 (was higher). Michael Rodriguez offer dead - no earnest money. Steve cleared property. More open to overall picture on offers now. Exclusions locked: Conex contents, camper trailer, feeders.
deals.next: Follow up with Steve once clearing wraps. When next offer comes, lead with net after close. Post drone footage to social.

logs.m: Steve signed amendment. MLS updated to $117,500. Commission box correction needed on amendment.
Clearing complete. Steve sent photos. Drone footage prioritized for marketing.
Current offer dead - option money not received. Steve clearing property. More open to offers overall.

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold, rents going up, need to move fast. Pivoting to new construction. No HOA firm requirement. 916 Marriott assessed - foundation issues, 2011 roof. Pre-approval target with Zach Schaphorst (MTG Broker). Erik Williams (Success Lending) backup.
leads.next: Confirm pre-approval status with Zach. Set up new construction platform. Identify builders with no HOA.

logs.m: Sent showingnew.com/chrisdrawdy. Text from Mike - rental selling, 916 Marriott passed.
Rental property selling. Introduced new construction - they were receptive. Pivoting strategy.

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Garden community connection. Grief to healing to plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Real estate potential through trust-based relationship.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Nurture relationship.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751. Wife is active military, VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting. Looking to purchase in San Antonio area. Warm relationship from job site.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info. Qualify wife VA eligibility. Send VA Buyers Guide.

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Dumpster contractor. Wife active military.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner
leads.detail: Downline agent Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in fixer property - unique situation. Details pending. Caught up May 11.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer and property. Understand financing and work needed.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome. Details pending on fixer buyer situation.

leads.title: Christina Shine
leads.detail: Met at garden event May 9. Has property at 13810 Tangle Tree St, plans to sell soon. Already working with realtor. Property ~90% complete, having trouble finishing. Open to as-is sale. Pre-market opportunity if current agent relationship stalls.
leads.next: Follow up - check on finishing progress. Offer to promote listing to network. Offer as-is conversation.

logs.m: Met at garden event. Property ~90% done. Struggling with finishing. Already has realtor.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Son
leads.detail: Inherited property directly behind Miss Pat. Deceased was avid gardener - plants on fence. Son is new owner, not yet contacted. Probate or inherited property opportunity. Community connection through Miss Pat.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out to son. Lead with neighbor/gardener first.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned deceased neighbor and son. Avid gardener. Community connection available.

leads.title: Kurt Lehr
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Nearby listing under contract at $275K. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Follow up on 9815 Conbes details. Determine if buyer or seller lead.

logs.m: Moving forward - pull CMA. Priority today alongside Colton Brown prep.

leads.title: Brandon Moran
leads.detail: Long-standing relationship - Chris helped Brandon start in real estate. Rental listing at Green Bliss (uncle Jimbo). Mom (Milagros Stringer) new construction buyer. Budget $50K down, target $1K/month payment. Not locked to any builder. Rate buydowns key strategy.
leads.next: Confirm visit with Brandon and mom. Call Carlos McLean before visit. Confirm mom contact info.

logs.m: Buyer rep sent to Milagros. Builder outreach in progress. MI Homes option from Frank pending review.
MI Homes option found. Payments under $1,200/mo. Rental setup separate (Jimbo/Green Bliss).
Buyer rep signed (Moran). Rental docs in folder (Green Bliss).
